description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image. Include a global before_script that runs python -V and a global after_script that also runs python -V. Define stages before_script, test, run, after_script and add a test job in the test stage that executes apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python3-dev python3-pip, pip3 install -r req.txt, pip3 install pylint, pip3 install pytest pytest-cov, then runs python3 -m pytest -s tests/test.py and python3 -m pytest -s --cov-report term --cov=. tests/test.py. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are needed.
